name: AAPL Analyst Rating Asymmetry
description: Is there asymmetry in AAPL's post-rating drift between analyst upgrades (PT raised) and downgrades (PT lowered)?
compute_hint: PT change percentage, forward returns at day-of, post-5d, post-10d, post-20d windows
signal_hint: Classify each rating change as Upgrade (PT raised) or Downgrade (PT lowered)

name: AAPL Gross Margin Expansion vs Contraction Drift
description: Does AAPL stock drift higher when quarterly gross margins expand versus contract?
compute_hint: Gross margin ratio (gross_profit/revenue), prior quarter margin via valuewhen, forward returns at day-of, post-5d, post-10d, post-20d
signal_hint: Classify each filing as Expanding (margin > prior) or Contracting (margin <= prior)

name: AAPL Post-Earnings Drift with Analyst Confirmation
description: Does analyst confirmation (PT raise after beat, PT cut after miss) strengthen AAPL's post-earnings drift?
compute_hint: Forward-filled analyst PT direction, forward returns at day-of, post-5d, post-10d, post-20d windows
signal_hint: Classify as Confirmed Beat (surprise > 0 + PT raise), Confirmed Miss (surprise < 0 + PT cut), or Unconfirmed

name: Mega-Cap Tech Valuation: Historical Z-Scores
description: Are current mega-cap tech valuations stretched or cheap relative to each company's own 1-year trading history?

queries: AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, META, NVDA

compute_hint: P/E and EV/EBITDA via finance_ratio, rolling 252-day z-scores (mean and stddev normalization)
signal_hint: Z-score magnitude indicates how stretched each stock's valuation is vs its own 1Y average

name: Mega-Cap Tech Valuation Snapshot
description: Which mega-cap tech stock is cheapest today on P/E, P/S, and EV/EBITDA?

queries: AAPL, MSFT, GOOGL, AMZN, META, NVDA

compute_hint: P/E, P/S, and EV/EBITDA via finance_ratio at latest date
signal_hint: Cross-sectional ranking of current valuation multiples across peers

name: AMZN Historical P/E Distribution
description: What P/E range has AMZN typically traded at, and where does the current multiple sit within that distribution?
compute_hint: P/E via finance_ratio, clamped to 0-200 range for outlier removal
signal_hint: Distribution shape reveals typical valuation regime and current positioning

name: CT Market Stats: Overnight, IB & Close -- ES Futures
description: How often does RTH price action touch overnight levels, break the initial balance, and where does ES close relative to key session levels?
compute_hint: Overnight high/low/mid, volume profile (VPOC, VAH, VAL via price_profile), IB levels, prior day IB/RTH levels, engulfing patterns
signal_hint: Touch rates for overnight levels, IB break classification (single/both/neither), close location after single IB break, engulfing detection

name: CT Market Stats: Auction & Opening Location -- ES Futures
description: What are the neutral day rates, harmonic rotation distributions, and opening location probabilities for ES futures?
compute_hint: Zigzag swing detection (swing_highs_lows, swing_length=2), up/down rotation sizes, prior day levels (close, HOD, LOD, IBH, IBL, VAH, VAL)
signal_hint: Neutral day classification (both IB broken), consecutive neutral probability, neutral extreme day, opening location vs prior session levels

name: CT Market Stats: Open vs Previous Range -- ES Futures
description: When ES opens above, within, or below the prior session range, how often does price touch each prior-session reference level?
compute_hint: Prior day RTH levels (close, HOD, LOD, open, mid, IBH, IBL, VPOC, VAH, VAL), half-gap levels, touch detection
signal_hint: Classify session open as above/within/below prior range, compute conditional touch probabilities for 11 prior-session levels

name: CT Market Stats: Volume & Range Distributions -- ES Futures
description: What are the typical volume and range distributions for ES futures across RTH, overnight, and initial balance sessions?
compute_hint: Per-session volume (RTH, ETH) and range (RTH, ETH, IB), mean/median/stddev statistics
signal_hint: Distribution shape analysis for volume and range across session types

name: CT IB & Close Analysis
description: What are the IB break probabilities and close location tendencies for SPY as an ES proxy?
compute_hint: IB high/low/mid, prior IB levels, IB break flags (single/both/neither), engulfing pattern detection
signal_hint: IB break probabilities (at-least-one, both, neither, only-IBH, only-IBL), conditional close location after single break, engulfing classification

name: CT Opening & Level Touch
description: How often does SPY's RTH session touch prior-session reference levels, conditioned on where the session opens?
compute_hint: Prior session levels (close, HOD, LOD, open, mid, IBH, IBL, VAH, VAL, VPOC), overnight levels (high, low, mid), approximate ON value area
signal_hint: Opening location classification (above/below pClose, pHOD, pLOD, within pIB/pValue), conditional touch rates for 10+ levels, overnight level touch rates

name: CT Session Structure
description: What is the typical harmonic rotation structure, auction day type distribution, and volume/range profile for SPY sessions?
compute_hint: Zigzag swing detection (swing_length=3), up/down rotation sizes, rotation counts, session efficiency (range/total distance), RTH/pre-market volume and range
signal_hint: Neutral day classification (both IB broken), neutral-follows-neutral probability, neutral extreme day (close in top/bottom 30%)

name: Avoid Waiting for "the Dip"
description: How long do investors typically wait between 5% pullbacks in the S&P 500, and is timing the dip a reliable strategy?
compute_hint: Cumulative max, drawdown from peak, barssince last 5% pullback via crossunder
signal_hint: Detect 5% pullback events (drawdown crosses below -5%)

name: Bitcoin vs Asset Classes: Returns and Volatility
description: How does Bitcoin's annualized return and average drawdown compare to stocks, bonds, and gold?
compute_hint: Daily returns, rolling 252-day annualized returns (SMA * 252), cumulative max drawdowns per asset
signal_hint: Cross-asset comparison of return-risk profiles

name: Bond Volatility: Annual Returns vs Intra-Year Declines
description: How volatile are bonds within a given year, and do intra-year drawdowns typically recover by year-end?
compute_hint: Rolling 252-day return as annual proxy, rolling 252-day max for intra-year drawdown, year extraction for labels
signal_hint: Year-over-year pattern of annual returns vs worst intra-year drawdowns

name: 10Y-2Y Treasury Yield Spread
description: Is the U.S. Treasury yield curve inverted, and what does the 10Y-2Y spread signal about recession risk?
compute_hint: Forward-fill spread, split into positive (uninverted) and negative (inverted) components via abs trick
signal_hint: Yield curve inversion detection (spread < 0 = inverted regime)

name: Federal Funds Rate and FOMC Projection
description: Where is the effective federal funds rate currently, and what does the FOMC project for future rate levels?
compute_hint: Forward-fill rates, filter FOMC projection to 2025+ forward period, convert to percent
signal_hint: Monetary policy trajectory: actual rate vs forward projection

name: Major Country Equity Performance in 2025
description: How did major country equity markets perform in 2025, and which countries delivered the strongest returns?

queries: SPY, EWZ, EWA, EWJ, EWU, EWC, EWQ, EWG, FXI, INDA

compute_hint: Daily returns per country ETF, cumulative YTD returns via cumulative sum
signal_hint: Cross-country ranking by cumulative return for the specific year

name: Major Country Equity Performance This Year
description: How are major country equity markets performing year-to-date, and which countries are leading or lagging?

queries: SPY, EWZ, EWA, EWJ, EWU, EWC, EWQ, EWG, FXI, INDA

compute_hint: Daily returns per country ETF, cumulative YTD returns via cumulative sum
signal_hint: Cross-country ranking by cumulative return for the rolling current year

name: Cycles of Gold vs S&P 500 Performance
description: How has the relative performance of gold versus the S&P 500 evolved over rolling 3-year periods?
compute_hint: 756-day (3-year) rolling return for each asset, spread = GLD return minus SPY return
signal_hint: Cyclical relative outperformance: positive spread = gold outperforming equities

name: 60/40 Portfolio Annual Returns vs Intra-Year Drawdowns
description: How common are intra-year drawdowns in a balanced 60/40 portfolio, and do they prevent positive annual returns?
compute_hint: returns, cumulative product for 60/40 blend, YTD return reset per year, peak drawdown
signal_hint: none

name: U.S. Initial Unemployment Claims
description: What do initial unemployment claims tell us about the current state of the U.S. labor market, and how do they compare historically?
compute_hint: ffill, scale to thousands
signal_hint: none

name: Major U.S. Index Performance in 2025
description: What were the total returns for the S&P 500, Dow, and NASDAQ Composite for the full year 2025?
compute_hint: cumulative first price, YTD return per index
signal_hint: none

name: Major U.S. Index Performance This Year
description: What are the year-to-date returns for the major U.S. stock indices, and how do they compare?
compute_hint: cumulative first price, YTD return per index
signal_hint: none

name: U.S. Index Cumulative Return Path This Year
description: How are the major U.S. stock indices performing so far this year, and which index is leading or lagging?
compute_hint: daily returns, cumulative sum for each index
signal_hint: none

name: Major U.S. Index Performance Path in 2025
description: How did the major U.S. stock indices perform over the course of 2025, and what was the trajectory of their returns?
compute_hint: daily returns, cumulative sum for each index
signal_hint: none

name: Monthly Job Growth with 3-Month Moving Average
description: How has monthly U.S. job growth trended recently, and what does the 3-month moving average reveal about the labor market's trajectory?
compute_hint: month-over-month change in nonfarm payrolls, 3-month moving average via valuewhen
signal_hint: none

name: Headline vs Core PCE Inflation Trends
description: What do the headline and core PCE inflation measures indicate about current consumer-level inflationary pressures?
compute_hint: year-over-year percentage change via valuewhen(12) for both headline and core PCE
signal_hint: none

name: 10% Pullback Frequency by Stock/Bond Split
description: How does the stock/bond allocation mix in a portfolio affect the frequency of 10% or greater pullbacks?
compute_hint: 11 weighted portfolio cumulative values (100/0 to 0/100), drawdowns from peak, crossunder -10% detection
signal_hint: crossunder drawdown threshold for pullback event detection

name: 5% Pullback Frequency by Stock/Bond Split
description: How does the stock-to-bond allocation in a portfolio affect the frequency of 5% pullbacks?
compute_hint: 11 weighted portfolio cumulative values (100/0 to 0/100), drawdowns from peak, crossunder -5% detection
signal_hint: crossunder drawdown threshold for pullback event detection

name: Win Ratio by Stock/Bond Allocation Split
description: How does the stock-to-bond allocation ratio impact the win ratio (percentage of positive yearly returns)?
compute_hint: 11 weighted portfolio daily returns, rolling 252-day mean return, binary win flag per split
signal_hint: none

name: Headline vs Core PPI Inflation Trends
description: What are the recent trends in producer-level inflation, and how do headline and core PPI compare?
compute_hint: year-over-year percentage change via valuewhen(12) for both headline and core PPI
signal_hint: none

name: Quits vs Hires in the U.S. Economy
description: How do voluntary quits compare to total hires in the U.S. labor market, and what does this ratio signal about worker confidence?
compute_hint: ffill for both quit and hire rate series
signal_hint: none

name: Historical U.S. Real GDP Growth
description: How has the overall size of the U.S. economy grown over the past seven decades in real inflation-adjusted terms?
compute_hint: ffill, convert billions to trillions

name: Quarterly U.S. GDP Growth Rate
description: What has the recent trajectory of U.S. GDP growth looked like, and what does the Atlanta Fed GDPNow model forecast for upcoming quarters?

name: Retail Sales Month-Over-Month Change
description: How have monthly retail sales been trending, and what does the recent data suggest about consumer spending strength?

signal_hint: none

name: S&P 500 Performance During Government Shutdowns
description: Do government shutdowns historically lead to negative stock market returns?

signal_hint: hardcoded event date detection via date_num matching

name: S&P 500 Annual All-Time High Count
description: How frequently does the S&P 500 reach new all-time highs, and do they tend to cluster together?
compute_hint: cumulative max, detect new ATH when close exceeds prior running max, sum by year
signal_hint: crossover detection for new all-time highs

name: S&P 500 Average Calendar-Year Path vs Current Year
description: How does the S&P 500 current year performance compare to the average calendar-year path since 2004?
compute_hint: YTD return per bar with year-open reset, split current year vs historical years

name: S&P 500 Average Post-Election Year Path vs Current Year
description: How does the S&P 500 typically perform during post-election years, and how is the current year tracking against that historical pattern?

name: S&P 500 Average Return by Calendar Month
description: Which months have historically been the strongest and weakest for the S&P 500, and what seasonal patterns exist?
compute_hint: month-end boundary detection, close-to-close monthly return via valuewhen, average by month

name: S&P 500 Average Returns Over Holding Periods

signal_hint: none

name: S&P 500 Average Up and Down Year Since 1950
description: How do average gains in up years compare to average losses in down years for the S&P 500?
compute_hint: Annual returns via 252-day lag, year-end detection via datetime_extract, split into up/down

name: S&P 500 Best and Worst Days Cluster
description: Do the best and worst daily moves in the S&P 500 occur randomly, or do they tend to cluster together?
compute_hint: Daily returns, threshold filter at +/-2% for extreme days
signal_hint: Boolean flags for big-up (>2%) and big-down (<-2%) days

description: How do the worst drawdowns in bonds compare to the worst drawdowns in stocks over the same time period?

name: S&P 500 Five Percent Pullbacks Annually
description: How frequently do 5% intra-year pullbacks occur in the S&P 500 on an annual basis?
compute_hint: Rolling 126-day high, drawdown, crossunder/crossover debounced pullback detection, rising-edge counting
signal_hint: Pullback entry flag via crossover on hold_until state

name: S&P 500 Short-Term View
description: How has the S&P 500 performed over the short term, and what does its recent price action look like?

signal_hint: none

name: S&P 500 One Percent Days by Decade
description: How does the frequency of 1%+ daily moves in the S&P 500 during the 2020s compare to prior decades?

signal_hint: none

name: S&P 500 Price During Presidential Terms
description: Does the political party of the U.S. president significantly impact long-term S&P 500 performance?
compute_hint: Year extraction, Democrat/Republican year classification, conditional price split by party
signal_hint: none

name: S&P 500 Returns During Bear Markets
description: How severe have past S&P 500 bear markets been, and what is the average decline investors should expect?
compute_hint: Cumulative max drawdown, dynamic bear detection via crossunder -20% entry / crossover +20% rally exit, bear period counting
signal_hint: hold_until bear state with rising-edge bear-start detection

name: S&P 500 Returns During Bull Markets
description: How do S&P 500 returns during historical bull markets compare to each other and to the current bull market?
compute_hint: Cumulative max drawdown, dynamic bear/bull detection, return-from-trough per bull cycle, exit counting

name: S&P 500 Santa Claus Rallies
description: Is the Santa Claus Rally a real seasonal pattern, and how significant are the returns during the year-end window?

description: How frequently does the S&P 500 reach new all-time highs, and should investors be concerned at new peaks?

name: Tactical Approaches and Significant Gains

name: Gold NFP Daily Reaction

compute_hint: valuewhen for prior NFP, regime classification (strong >200K vs weak <100K), day-of and post-20d returns, cumulative event returns

description: Is MSFT's earnings growth accelerating or decelerating quarter over quarter?
compute_hint: ffill EPS, YoY EPS growth via shift(252), P/E ratio via finance_ratio, quarter label extraction

name: MSFT Rate Sensitivity
description: Does MSFT underperform when real interest rates are rising?
compute_hint: ffill real yield, sma(60) for regime, log returns, cumulative return by regime

name: AUDNZD Macro Fair Value
description: Is AUDNZD over- or undervalued relative to a PCA-based macro fair value model using rates, inflation, risk, and terms of trade?
compute_hint: ml_zscore, pca, multi_linear_fit, winsorize, zscore, ffill
signal_hint: z-score of residual deviation from rolling OLS fair value

name: EM Carry Calendar Shift
description: Do EM currencies (BRL, MXN, ZAR) strengthen when crude oil surges 10%+ per quarter, and does the dollar regime matter?
compute_hint: ffill, calendar_shift, where, returns
signal_hint: oil rip detection (10%+ quarterly gain), DXY regime split (weak vs strong USD)

name: SPY/TLT Correlation Regime
description: How do gold, the dollar, and VIX react in the 20 days after SPY/TLT correlation flips from negative to positive?
compute_hint: returns, rolling_corr, crossover, where, cumulative, datetime_extract, forward shift returns
signal_hint: correlation zero-crossing (neg to pos), era classification (Taper/Post-2021/Other)

name: BMO FX Mood Correlation
description: Which G10 and EM currencies are most correlated with global risk appetite (VIX proxy), and how has that changed over 3 months?

queries: EURUSD, GBPUSD, USDJPY, AUDUSD, USDCAD, USDCHF, NZDUSD, USDNOK, USDSEK, USDTWD, USDZAR, USDBRL, USDMXN, USDKRW, USDINR, USDIDR, USDCLP, USDHUF, USDPLN, USDCNH, XAUUSD

compute_hint: returns, rolling_corr(130d), backward shift (65d lag)
signal_hint: 6-month rolling correlation of USD-quoted FX returns vs inverted VIX

name: BMO Global Risk Sentiment MOOD
description: What is the current state of global risk appetite measured by an equally-weighted composite of equities, credit, vol, rates, and FX?
compute_hint: returns, zscore(252d), ffill, sma(20)
signal_hint: 5-component z-score composite (equities, credit, vol, rates, FX)
